messages.content: paraphrase this: PR has been sent to managers to be signed.
The press release has been dispatched to managers for their signatures.
paraphrase this: Please explain clearly about the request?
Could you please clarify the details of the request?
paraphrase this: You can just safely ignore this.
Feel free to disregard this without concern.
paraphrase this: Feel free to disregard this error; just close it
You can safely ignore this mistake; simply close it.
paraphrase this: We'll check from vendor first if adapter is available.
We will first verify the availability of the adapter with the vendor.
paraphrase this: Please advise if we can provide attendance machine or use Menaitech as their attendance as per the ticket.
Could you advise whether we can supply an attendance machine or if they should use Menaitech for their attendance in accordance with the ticket details?
paraphrase this: I'd like to ask if Noel had laptop provided by Milestone?
I'm inquiring whether Noel received a laptop from Milestone?
paraphrase this: We're working on it and will update you as soon as possible.
We are currently handling it and will provide you with an update at the earliest opportunity.
paraphrase this: Requested name has been changed. Please wait after 24 hours to be effective.
The name you requested has been updated. Please allow 24 hours for the changes to take effect.
paraphrase this: We need approval from Ahmed al-Shehri.
We require authorization from Ahmed al-Shehri.
